@mt: The '{type}' property '{property}' on entity type '{entityType}' is configured with a database-generated default, but has no configured sentinel value. The database-generated default will always be used for inserts when the property has the value '{defaultValue}', since this is the CLR default for the '{type2}' type. Consider using a nullable type, using a nullable backing field, or setting the sentinel value for the property to ensure the database default is used when, and only when, appropriate. See https://aka.ms/efcore-docs-default-values for more information.
